mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_import_batch ( account_group_id, source_file_name, source_file_type, import_format, device_os, account_type, ip_region, total_rows, imported_rows, duplicate_rows, format_error_rows, status, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{accountGroupId}, #{sourceFileName}, #{sourceFileType}, #{importFormat}, #{deviceOs}, #{accountType}, #{ipRegion}, #{totalRows}, #{importedRows}, #{duplicateRows}, #{formatErrorRows}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account_import_batch b WHERE

SELECT b.id, b.source_file_name AS sourceFileName, b.import_format AS importFormat, b.device_os AS deviceOs, b.account_type AS accountType, b.ip_region AS ipRegion, b.total_rows AS totalRows, b.imported_rows AS importedRows, b.duplicate_rows AS duplicateRows, b.format_error_rows AS formatErrorRows, b.login_success AS loginSuccess, b.login_failed AS loginFailed, b.login_abnormal AS loginAbnormal, b.status, g.name AS groupName, b.created_at AS createdAt FROM account_import_batch b LEFT JOIN account_group g ON b.account_group_id = g.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
